name: maya-v1-sceptic
walkthrough_hook: I DIDN'T THINK THIS WOULD WORK
walkthrough_voiceover: I'll be honest. I thought it'd be naff. I filled in the form anyway. Five questions. About a minute. Then she heard her own name. Tonight's story is hers. Hers alone. The hero is... Maya.

end_card.headline: A story that knows their name.
